Vercel Logo

# Vercel Academy

Go from beginner to expert by learning the ins and outs of Vercel, Next.js, Turborepo, AI SDK and more to build fully functional apps that use all the latest features.

## Courses

[**Build Visual Workflow Plugins on Vercel** \\
Deploy a visual workflow builder on Vercel and extend it with plugins for the APIs you actually use. Learn Vercel Workflow fundamentals along the way.](https://vercel.com/academy/visual-workflow-builder-on-vercel) [**Builders Guide to the AI SDK** \\
Build production-ready AI features with the AI SDK & Next.js. Learn LLMs, prompting, extraction, streaming, & more.](https://vercel.com/academy/ai-sdk) [**Building Filesystem Agents** \\
Build a file system agent that uses bash tools and Vercel Sandbox to explore call transcripts and answer questions.](https://vercel.com/academy/filesystem-agents) [**Creating an AI Summary App with Next.js** \\
Build an AI-powered summary application using Next.js App Router and the Vercel AI SDK. You'll implement text summarization, structured output, caching, and production-ready patterns.](https://vercel.com/academy/ai-summary-app-with-nextjs) [**Launch a Subscription Store with Vercel and Stripe** \\
Build a production-ready subscription storefront with Next.js 16, React 19, Supabase Auth, and Stripe. Learn authentication, payments, and access control.](https://vercel.com/academy/subscription-store) [**Microfrontends on Vercel** \\
Build scalable, independent frontend applications with Vercel's microfrontends platform.](https://vercel.com/academy/microfrontends-on-vercel) [**Next.js Foundations** \\
Prepare for the self-paced Foundations workshop. Across four sections you'll build two production-ready apps (web + blog) using Next.js and Vercel. This page outlines what you'll build, how we teach, prerequisites, and the section-by-section roadmap.](https://vercel.com/academy/nextjs-foundations) [**Production Monorepos with Turborepo** \\
Build a production monorepo from idea to enterprise scale with Turborepo and Next.js.](https://vercel.com/academy/production-monorepos) [**React UI with shadcn/ui + Radix + Tailwind** \\
Learn the fundamentals of modern UI development with shadcn/ui. Master component libraries, Radix primitives, and build production-ready interfaces.](https://vercel.com/academy/shadcn-ui) [**Slack Agents on Vercel with the AI SDK** \\
Step-by-step course to build, deploy, and run a real Slack bot on Vercel using the AI SDK, with logging, safeguards, and an ops runbook for your team’s workspace.](https://vercel.com/academy/slack-agents)
